Redesign PCA test data with massive within-group variance

commit.message:
Remove .env.example file

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Refactor expression grammar: rename primary→postfix, unify postfix ops

- Rename `primary` rule to `postfix`, extract `postfix_op` and
  `postfix_base_op` silent rules for shared postfix operation sets
- Generalize `compound_expr_stmt` from `try_suffix?` to `postfix_op*`,
  enabling `if True { [1,2,3] }.pop()` and `{ x }?.method()`
- Rename `try_fallback_*` rules to `fallback_*`, reuse `postfix_base_op`
- Extract `apply_postfix_ops` helper shared by `parse_postfix` and
  `parse_compound_expr_stmt`
- Replace blanket `postfix_seen` flag with separate `last_was_try` and
  `last_was_postfix_incr` tracking: `x++?` is now valid while `x++++`
  and `x??` remain rejected
- Relax `parse_compact_try_suffix` to only reject `AugAssign` (not
  `PostfixIncr`/`PrefixIncr`)
- Fix `restricted_assign_target_from_expr` to always use the clean
  message instead of dumping AST on unknown expression types

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: lightbox iOS bug, bio note on mobile, sticky note clipping

- CRITICAL: remove overflow-y:auto from lb-overlay (triggers iOS Safari
  position:fixed viewport-anchor bug). Move scroll to lb-shell instead:
  lb-shell gets overflow-y:auto + -webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch so the
  lightbox correctly covers the full screen again including the nav area
- Hide bio-note-outer on mobile (display:none) — it's desktop-only and was
  appearing over the lightbox due to the displaced overlay
- Lower bio-note-outer z-index to 1600 (was 2000) so lightbox at 3500 always wins
- Sticky note configs: move to top:6px (inside card frame) — guarantees note is
  never clipped regardless of card position in scatter table

commit.message:
refactor: restructure install.bat into strict 9-step setup-only script

Two-stage design: install.bat = environment setup, run.bat = execution.
install.bat MUST NOT start servers, open browser, or run tests.

Step changes:
- [3] Verify ADB: binary check only (removed SDK detection)
- [4] Install Appium if missing (unchanged)
- [5] Install UiAutomator2 if missing (unchanged)
- [6] Create Python venv only (split from pip install)
- [7] pip install requirements.txt (separated from venv creation)
- [8] Detect Android SDK (moved from step 3; sets ANDROID_HOME)
- Success banner updated to exact format:
  "SpatchEx Automation Installed / Next step: / Run: run.bat"

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(edge): fall back to existing SSM value when DDNS hostname cannot resolve

When home.awoo.agency has no A record yet (e.g. porkbun-ddns-update.sh
hasn't been run), getaddrinfo raises NXDOMAIN. Fall back to reading the
existing /glitch/waf/allowed-ipv4 SSM parameter so the deploy succeeds
without requiring the DDNS record to exist first.

in Claude Code by symlinking ~/.claude to named profiles.
No npm, no dependencies, just bash.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: reorder IIFE normalization before double-brace collapse, handle post-return text

Moves IIFE normalization before the `;}}`→`;}` double-brace
normalization which was eating IIFE closing braces. Also preserves
text after `return EXPR;` in single-return IIFEs, and adds multi-return
IIFE→labeled block conversion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

🔀 fix: 301 redirects for 3 old PSP PHP URLs found in blog content

Spider crawl found 3 internal 404s — old .php URLs from prostagespermis.fr
still referenced in migrated blog post content:
- /agrements.php → /agrements-du-stage
- /annulation-permis.php → /annulation-permis
- /bareme-retrait-points.php → /bareme-de-retrait-de-points

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: add public subnet to Cloud NAT (frontend needs outbound internet)

Frontend instances have no public IP (traffic comes via LB), so they
can't reach apt repos to install nginx without Cloud NAT. Added public
subnet to NAT config alongside private subnet.

Classic gotcha: "public subnet" doesn't mean "has internet" when
instances lack external IPs. Blog-worthy learning.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add CivOS-LM v0.1: open-weight reasoning model with Ollama Modelfile

Deployable CivOS-LM model wrapping Mistral (Apache 2.0) with the full
Prolegomena reasoning layer baked into the system prompt. Anyone can run
`ollama create civos-lm -f models/Modelfile` to get a local AI that
reasons through Beier Disclosure, BDM selectorate theory, Nostalgia
Mirage detection, thirteen Beier Economics fields, and Scaling analysis.

No API keys. No cloud. No data leaves the machine. Open weights.

Includes Modelfile, launch script, install guide, and README section
with examples. Tested with five queries covering all reasoning modes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

chore: set version baseline to 0.2.1 (#4)

Update pyproject.toml, __init__.py, and release-please manifest
to 0.2.1 so Release Please computes 0.2.2 as the next release
instead of 1.0.0.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: remove 30s approval prune, rely on LRU cap only

The delayed prune caused resolved approvals to flash from ApprovalCard
to a plain text fallback mid-conversation. Resolved approvals now stay
in the store as proper ApprovalCards until evicted by the 200-entry cap.

commit.message:
Add auto-fill: project demand & supply auto-scale from reference benchmarks

When Houses, Occupancy, or any Reference input changes, demand and supply
fields are automatically populated by scaling from Antharam reference data:
- LPCD: same standard as reference
- Pool top-up: same (fixed asset)
- Other consumption: scales with population ratio
- STP capacity: scales with population ratio
- Municipal/Tanker: scales with population ratio
- RWH storage: ref-rwh-per-house × project houses

Auto-filled fields shown in green; manually overridden fields shown in yellow.
'Reset All to Auto' button clears manual overrides and re-runs auto-fill.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
#1063 Detect uncommitted plan files in lefthook pre-commit (#1065)

## Issue

Closes #1063

## 概要

計画ファイル（`prompts/plans/`）のコミット漏れが 3 回再発している問題に対し、lefthook pre-commit
で未コミット変更を自動検出する hook を追加。品質ゲート 6.4 を手動確認から自動検出方式に更新。

## 品質確認

- 設計・ドキュメント: セッションログ
`prompts/runs/2026-03/2026-03-06_2100_detect-uncommitted-plan-files.md`、品質ゲート
`.claude/rules/dev-flow-issue.md` 更新済み。ADR 該当なし（既存パターンの拡張）
- Issue との整合: 完了基準 3 項目すべて達成（スクリプト追加、警告表示、品質ゲート更新）
- テスト: シェルスクリプトのため手動検証。3 パターン確認済み（変更あり→警告、変更なし→無出力、ステージ済み→除外）
- コード品質（マイナス→ゼロ）: 既存 `scripts/check/` パターンに準拠、lefthook parallel
設定と共存確認済み
- 品質向上（ゼロ→プラス）: 責務単一（未コミット計画ファイルの検出のみ）
- UI/UX: N/A（バックエンド/ツーリングのみ）
- 横断検証: N/A（単一スコープ）
- `just check` + CI pass: DynamoDB テスト・クローン検出は既存の環境依存問題。本 PR
の変更に関連する失敗なし

## 確認項目

- [x] lefthook pre-commit で警告が正しく表示される
- [x] ステージ済みファイルで false positive が発生しない
- [x] 品質ゲート 6.4 が自動検出を反映している

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Code (v2.1.70, Opus 4.6) <noreply@anthropic.com>

過去レポート閲覧時にGA4 APIを呼ばず、レポート生成時に保存された
スナップショットデータのみで表示するように変更。

- バックフィル処理を削除（スナップショット未保存の旧レポートはAPI再取得しない）
- Effective CV のAPIフォールバックを削除（スナップショットからのみ取得）
- 管理者向け「データ再取得」ボタンを削除（確定帳票として不変性を保証）

- スナップショット未保存時は「データなし」/ デフォルト値を表示

module and inject WorkerMessageHandler before pdf-to-img uses it.

Platform services (e.g. workflow-service) need to create runs and track costs
for system operations that have no org or user context. Adds three new endpoints
under /v1/platform-runs with x-service-name header auth instead of x-org-id.

- POST /v1/platform-runs/:id/costs — add cost line items
- PATCH /v1/platform-runs/:id — update run status

commit.message:
feat(ai-context): replace skill router with inline imperative instructions (#190)

CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md now contain direct enforcement instructions instead
of a passive skill router table. Based on Vercel eval data showing skills
are skipped 56% of the time, and industry research on effective AGENTS.md
patterns from 2,500+ repos.

Key changes:
- Always/When/Never three-tier boundary structure
- RFC 2119 language (MUST, NEVER) for critical rules
- Exact tool commands with parameters inline
- Self-check checklist forcing model to verify its own work
- ~77 lines, well within the <150 line adherence threshold

Skills are still installed as bonus depth for Claude Code's skill system.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add file_write and file_update tools

New tools:
- file_write: Write file (overwrite mode)
- file_update: Update specific lines with line number + old_text verification

Changes:
- file_write: Overwrites entire file content
- file_update: Takes array of changes, each with:
  - line: line number (0-indexed)
  - old_text: exact original line text (required for safety)
  - new_text: new line content

Removed:
- file_edit: Replaced by file_update (line-based editing)

Usage:
    # Write/overwrite file
    file_write("config.py", "DEBUG = False\n")

    # Update specific lines
    file_update("config.py", changes=[
        {"line": 5, "old_text": "DEBUG = True", "new_text": "DEBUG = False"},
        {"line": 10, "old_text": "PORT = 8080", "new_text": "PORT = 3000"}
    ])
